generated_oml:
instance RaspberryPiSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi sensors collecting crane state data for the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted from Physical Crane Interface to TimescaleDB for storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, AzureVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for historical data storage of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AzureVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure Power BI for real-time data visualization of crane system states"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storing and analyzing historical operational data of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time monitoring of gantry crane system states through visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing precise movements for gantry crane control using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PreciseMovementAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing physical and digital twin states to ensure synchronization accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationAccuracyInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data analysis for operational improvements"
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system states for monitoring purposes"
]

instance PreciseMovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic computation of precise movements for gantry crane control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SynchronizationAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on accuracy of synchronization between physical and digital twin states"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Research and educational environment for lab-scale gantry crane digital twin experiments"
    base:contains GantryCraneStructure, GantryCraneController, RaspberryPiSensor, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance GantryCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated controller for the gantry crane system"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program acting as Physical Crane Interface for data transmission to virtual system"
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based kinematic model for gantry crane movement control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical and digital twin states"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application utilizes trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service to issue movement commands via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams, utilizes containerization for deployment, and follows an ad-hoc implementation approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is employed for inter-service communication among digital twin components. TimescaleDB and Grafana are used for data storage and visualization, respectively. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling and utilizes Microsoft Azure cloud services for pipeline implementation, ensuring compliance with industrial automation specifications."
]
